scripts.dev: concurrently --names "tidal,bpm,next" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run tidal" "npm run bpm" "next dev"
scripts.tidal: cd "${TIDAL_MCP_DIR:-../tidal-mcp}" && TIDAL_MCP_PORT=5100 uv run python tidal_api/app.py
scripts.bpm: cd bpm-service && BPM_SERVICE_PORT=5101 uv run python bpm_service.py
